## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX teams to discuss blog content production, publishing processes, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New proofreading step added to workflow to catch errors from multiple editors](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Image handling process clarified; GrowthX to create header images using Figma](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Website structure changes discussed; considering reverting from /resources to /blog](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Analytics issues identified and being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Quality Control

  - [Three new blog posts published since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Identified source of caption issues (meta descriptions pulled forward)](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [New final proofreading step added to workflow to catch errors from multiple editors](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Town team given permission to make minor edits directly in CMS for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Image Handling Process

  - [GrowthX team to create header images using Figma, pending editor permissions](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [New text-on-graphic format to be used instead of people images](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Future plans to integrate image creation into production pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Website Structure and SEO

  - [Discussing potential reversion from /resources back to /blog URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Need for redirects (301) from /blog to /resources or vice versa](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining consistent URL structure for SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Google Analytics tracking was broken for a few days due to wrong key implementation](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Google Search Console data unaffected, showing continued impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Team to monitor analytics closely as new content is published](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Publishing Schedule and Workflow

  - [Discussion on staggering publish dates instead of bulk publishing](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Clarification on review process: minor changes approved with comments, major changes require re-review](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to check Figma permissions and coordinate with Town team for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Town team to discuss with Tony about reverting to /blog structure or implementing redirects](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Implement staggered publishing schedule for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Continue monitoring analytics and addressing any remaining tracking issues](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [GrowthX to address any pending comments before publishing approved content](https://fathom.video/share/c-BwCKbzbjCh9K4VdqyMydFNQzjQfYCv?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
